hero.name: Cao Bao Gia Luat

hero.tagline: Turning ideas into practical software solutions. Developing software systems that deliver value to users and businesses.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: WEB DEVELOPER
about.bio: I am a final-year Information Technology student at the University of Transport Ho Chi Minh City (UTH). With a solid foundation in web programming cultivated and accumulated throughout my studies, I focus on developing skills around the React/Next.js and Node.js ecosystems. My goal is to continuously learn and improve myself to create the best products for users and bring value to businesses.

info.location: Tan Binh, Ho Chi Minh City

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Real-world products I have participated in designing and developing.

items.title: Human Anomaly Localization
items.description: A real-time AI surveillance system applying Computer Vision to detect abnormal behaviors (falls), helping to ensure the safety of the elderly and children. Achieved up to 90% accuracy.
highlights: Built a 4-path hybrid detection algorithm (evaluating Bounding Box ratio, angle, and velocity).
Developed a Border Integrity Check mechanism to eliminate camera edge noise.
Established smooth real-time video streaming via WebSocket with FastAPI.
Packaged and served the YOLOv8s-pose model as asynchronous RESTful APIs.

items.title: Jewelry Sales System
items.description: A reception and management system for the diamond appraisal process (following GIA 4C standards) applying Microservices architecture, ensuring smooth operation and easy scalability.
highlights: Developed a valuation lookup interface and an intuitive statistical Dashboard with Next.js.
Built an independent Appraisal Service using Express.js.
Designed an optimized PostgreSQL schema, ensuring data integrity and query speed.
Dockerized all services to unify the deployment environment.

items.title: SEVINA - Car Rental Platform
items.description: A web platform for self-driving car rentals. Integrates maps for positioning, vehicle tracking, and suggests the nearest car stations (10-20km radius) based on user coordinates.
highlights: Built a modern, highly interactive UI/UX using ReactJS, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
Integrated Goong Map API for location logic and station distance calculation.
Strictly managed system state with Redux.
Established CI/CD pipeline and automated deployment on Vercel.
